sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8488" key="a)nereuqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνερευθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, of cancerous ulcers, <sense id="n8488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pallid,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.106</biblScope> </bibl> (bis), but prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐν-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
